one_line: Maratha sovereign plotting his escape from Aurangzeb’s confinement in Agra, 1666 CE.

appearance.age_look: Mid-30s, compact and athletic build with a soldier’s poise.
appearance.face: Oval face, wheatish-brown complexion, neatly trimmed pointed black beard and moustache, high cheekbones, sharp dark eyes with a focused yet calm gaze, default expression serious with a hint of determined resolve.
appearance.hair: Black hair pulled back into a tight topknot hidden under a white Maratha-style pagdi (turban) with a slight forward tilt and a small gold turban ornament at the front center.
appearance.costume: Short white cotton angarkha tunic with wrap-style front and knee-length flare, worn over off-white churidar-style tight trousers; a deep saffron cotton patka (waist sash) tied firmly at the waist with loose ends hanging to the left; over the angarkha a sleeveless quilted dark-leaf-green cotton waistcoat (padded but thin, reaching just below the waist) signifying a subtle martial readiness; soft brown leather mojari shoes with upturned toes; minimal jewellery—small round gold earrings, a single thin gold chain with a tiny pendant partly visible above the angarkha collar, and a simple iron bangle on the right wrist, all consistent with a ruler traveling under constraint but retaining dignified Maratha attire.
appearance.signature: A single steel straight-edged talwar sword with a gently curving blade sheathed at his left hip in a plain dark-brown leather scabbard, featuring a traditional Indo-Muslim hilt with disc pommel and knuckle-guard, carried even in semi-court dress as his constant side-arm.

ref_desc: Shivaji Maharaj is a mid-30s compact warrior with wheatish skin, pointed black beard, white turban, white angarkha, off-white trousers, saffron sash, dark green sleeveless waistcoat, brown mojari shoes, and a steel talwar at his left hip with white, saffron, dark green, brown, and gold accents.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style character sheet of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj in 1666: a mid-30s compact Maratha ruler with wheatish-brown skin and an oval face, sharp dark eyes, and a neatly trimmed pointed black beard and moustache, his default expression serious and resolute. His black hair is tied back in a topknot under a white Maratha pagdi with a slight forward tilt and a small gold ornament at the front. He wears a short white cotton angarkha with a wrap front and knee-length flare over off-white churidar trousers, a deep saffron cotton patka tightly wrapped at the waist with ends hanging to the left, and a sleeveless quilted dark-leaf-green cotton waistcoat reaching just below the waist. On his feet are brown leather mojari shoes with upturned toes. Show minimal jewellery: small round gold earrings, a thin gold chain with a tiny pendant at the neck, and an iron bangle on his right wrist. At his left hip, clearly display his signature weapon—a sheathed steel talwar with a gently curving blade, plain dark-brown leather scabbard, and traditional Indo-Muslim hilt with disc pommel and knuckle guard. Use a palette dominated by white, saffron, dark green, brown, and gold, and present him front and back in consistent anime style, emphasizing historically grounded Mughal-era Maratha clothing and the fixed arrangement of turban, angarkha, sash, waistcoat, shoes, and sword.
